# Risk Register

## Risk R1 — False certainty

Symptom:

```text
Declaring a mechanism works after one post.
```

Control:

```text
Replication Trio required.
```

## Risk R2 — Raw-view addiction

Symptom:

```text
Scaling posts with high views but low saves/follows/trust.
```

Control:

```text
Use primary metric + guardrail metric. For Shorts, track engaged views and percentage viewed.
```

## Risk R3 — Overfitting to one platform

Symptom:

```text
Everything depends on one surface.
```

Control:

```text
Platform-native translations and portfolio model.
```

## Risk R4 — Clickbait debt

Symptom:

```text
High starts, low completion, bad comments, low follows.
```

Control:

```text
Trust gate and promise-body test.
```

## Risk R5 — Slop perception

Symptom:

```text
Templated AI-like content, generic advice, low originality.
```

Control:

```text
Proof, judgment, examples, process footage.
```

## Risk R6 — Measurement noise

Symptom:

```text
Making decisions from tiny samples or inconsistent metrics.
```

Control:

```text
Minimum exposure rule, controlled exposure, replication.
```

## Risk R7 — Endless research without shipping

Symptom:

```text
Adding hypotheses forever without publishing tests.
```

Control:

```text
Weekly shipping quota and anti-stall protocol.
```
